name: snapvault
description: Local-first browser capture extension for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge.

scripts.dev:chrome: cross-env TARGET_BROWSER=chrome npm run sync:browser-shells && cross-env TARGET_BROWSER=chrome wxt -b chrome
scripts.dev:edge: cross-env TARGET_BROWSER=edge npm run sync:browser-shells && cross-env TARGET_BROWSER=edge wxt -b edge
scripts.dev:firefox: cross-env TARGET_BROWSER=firefox npm run sync:browser-shells && cross-env TARGET_BROWSER=firefox wxt -b firefox
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:edge && npm run build:firefox
scripts.test:e2e:extension: npm run test:e2e:extension:chromium && npm run test:e2e:extension:edge && npm run test:firefox:package
scripts.test:e2e:extension:chromium: cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 npm run build:chrome && cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 playwright test -c e2e/playwright.extension.config.ts --project=chromium-extension --project=chromium-extension-hidpi
scripts.test:e2e:extension:edge: cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 npm run build:edge && cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 playwright test -c e2e/playwright.extension.config.ts --project=edge-extension --project=edge-extension-hidpi
scripts.test:perf:extension:chromium: cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 npm run build:chrome && cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 playwright test -c e2e/playwright.extension.config.ts e2e/performance.spec.ts --project=chromium-extension
scripts.test:perf:extension:edge: cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 npm run build:edge && cross-env SNAPVAULT_E2E=1 playwright test -c e2e/playwright.extension.config.ts e2e/performance.spec.ts --project=edge-extension
scripts.test:perf:extension: npm run test:perf:extension:chromium && npm run test:perf:extension:edge
scripts.test:firefox:package: npm run zip:firefox && node scripts/validate-build-artifacts.mjs firefox && npm run lint:firefox:baseline
scripts.typecheck: npm run sync:browser-shells && wxt prepare && tsc --noEmit
scripts.zip:all: npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:edge && npm run zip:firefox
